v3redo_gpt-5_3-codex.summary: Implement a dedicated reusable rendering layer that centralizes output behavior for greetings: build a Rich console with `--no-color` support, render optional per-language pyfiglet banners gated by `--no-figlet`, and provide a deterministic plain-text fallback when color/figlet is disabled or optional libraries are unavailable. Wire the CLI command to call this renderer after language selection so
